title: Pungent Indian Kale Hyderabadi Pakora
description: A flavorful and nutritious Indian dish made with kale, perfect as a solo dinner.

ingredients.name: Kale
ingredients.amount: 2 cups, stems removed and discarded, leaves torn into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.name: Spices and Herbs
ingredients.notes: cumin seeds, coriander powder, turmeric, red chili powder, garam masala, amchur powder, salt

instructions: Soak the gram flour in 1/2 cup of water for 30 minutes.
Squeeze the water from the soaked gram flour and mix it with spices and herbs, ginger paste, garlic paste, lemon juice.
Add the torn kale leaves to the batter and mix well.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the kale batter into the hot oil and fry until golden brown.
Drain the pakora on paper towels and serve hot with a side of chutney or raita.
